items.html: Afterwards came the time of the Yenika [suckling] in the secret of the internality [Pnimiut] of ZON [Zeir Anpin and Nukva] — and I have not received its matter. And afterwards came the second Ibur [conception], of the Mochin of the internality of ZON; and this was a very great upper Zivug [coupling], for the seven lower [Sefirot] of Atik Yomin, which clothed in the seven corrections of the Galgalta [skull] of Arich, as mentioned — from them is drawn the internality of the Mochin in the first three [Sefirot] of ZON.
